# GrowLocal 360

> GrowLocal 360 is a platform for local service businesses and marketing agencies that builds GBP-first SEO websites, turns completed jobs into proof-driven content, and helps businesses rank higher in local search.

## What is GrowLocal 360?

GrowLocal 360 helps local service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, landscaping, appliance repair, pressure washing, fencing, handyman) launch websites structured around their Google Business Profile categories. The platform includes:

- **GBP-First Website Architecture**: Websites built around actual Google Business Profile service categories for maximum local search relevance.
- **Job Snaps**: A system that lets users upload photos from completed jobs, generate AI-assisted descriptions, and publish that proof to their website and Google Business Profile — turning every completed job into SEO content, trust signals, and local authority.
- **AI Content Generation**: Service pages, category pages, service area pages, and brand pages generated with AI based on real business data.
- **Google Business Profile Integration**: Sync GBP data and auto-post completed jobs to keep the profile active and visible.
- **Review Management**: Automated review requests and AI-powered replies.
- **Lead Capture & CRM**: Built-in lead forms, appointment booking, and pipeline management.
- **Missed Call Text Back**: Automatic text response when calls are missed.
- **Multi-location & Microsite Support**: Single-location, multi-location, and exact-match domain microsite website structures.

## Website Types

- **Single Location**: For businesses focused on one primary GBP and city.
- **Multi-Location**: For brands managing multiple GBPs or service areas.
- **Microsite (EMD)**: For targeted campaigns or exact-match domain opportunities.

## Industries Served

- HVAC
- Appliance Repair
- Pressure Washing
- Plumbing
- Fence Building
- Handyman Services
- Roofing
- Landscaping

## Pricing

Free to create an account. Users pay only when they activate a website.

## Links

- Website: https://www.growlocal360.com
- App: https://app.growlocal360.com
